name: HelixQA Fixes Validation — AI
description: Nexus AI-layer regression suite covering B10 AUC sort crossover and W6 OrchestratorClient wiring.

test_cases.name: Predictor AUC uses sort.Slice above cutoff (B10)
test_cases.expected_result: Large-holdout AUC is tractable; no quadratic slowdown

fix_reference.rationale: Insertion-sort path retained for small inputs; sort.Slice above cutoff (500)

test_cases.name: OrchestratorClient satisfies LLMClient (W6)

steps.name: NewNavigator(&OrchestratorClient{...}, cost, model)
steps.expected: compiles — Chat(ctx, req) method set matches LLMClient interface

test_cases.expected_result: Navigator/Healer/Generator can use OrchestratorClient without an HTTP fallback

fix_reference.rationale: Client implements Chat, satisfying the LLMClient interface the three consumers accept

test_cases.name: Predictor AUC handles empty and single-class gracefully
test_cases.expected_result: B10 sort change does not regress empty/single-class semantics
